characters.name: Bob
characters.description: BobBackground informationFirst AppearanceTwice the TalentLast AppearanceKapowsers!OverviewNameBobGenderMaleSpeciesAlienBobis a little pink alien who appeared in several episodes. He first appeared in the episodeTwice the Talent. Bob is very small and stubby. He's pink with a downtide cyan afro, three purple antenna's with pink on the tips, two hot magenta, translucent wings, five stubby legs, eyes that stick out the side of his head, and a blank facial expression. He is often seen flying as opposed to walking. Bob has a bored, monotonous way of speaking. He often appears to be bored with nothing better to do. Bob is shown to be helpful, helping Comet with a parade float in the episodeI Love a Parade! Sometimes...and attempting to help Sal with lights inA Star is Born. Bob's shown to be the type to tell spoilers inSputnik the Spoiler, spoiling every book Sputnik wants to read. Bob may not understand some forms of technology, not seeing the point of the Super Sing-Along 5000 inSing Along to the Bouncing Monkey. Bob has a bored, monotonous way of speaking. He often appears to be bored with nothing better to do. Bob is shown to be helpful, helping Comet with a parade float in the episodeI Love a Parade! Bob may not understand some forms of technology, not seeing the point of the Super Sing-Along 5000 inSing Along to the Bouncing Monkey.

characters.name: Comet
characters.description: CometBackground informationFirst AppearanceSpic 'n SpanLast AppearanceKapowsers!Voiced byVinnie PennaOverviewGenderMaleSpeciesDogLikesCaptain Super DuperRelativesFlash(brother)FriendsHalleySputnikRadarJetSal Cometis the leader of the Astroblast crew, and the main protagonist of the series. He is voiced byVinnie Penna. Comet is a red dog with slightly darker ears, and large spots which are scattered across his face. He wears a blue space suit that has a white trim and two small buttons of the same color, along with a yellow belt emblazoned with the Astroblast emblem. Comet is known for his loud, exciting personality. He has been shown to be somewhat conceited. Comet is a big fan of Captain Super Duper. He reads many comic books and loves to play with his action figures. He is very good friends withHalley.
characters.personality_section: Comet is known for his loud, exciting personality. He has been shown to be somewhat conceited. Comet is a big fan of Captain Super Duper. He reads many comic books and loves to play with his action figures. He is very good friends withHalley.

characters.name: Halley
characters.description: HalleyBackground informationFirst AppearanceSpic 'n SpanLast AppearanceKapowsers!Created byBob KolarVoiced byGigi AbrahamOverviewNameHalleyGenderFemaleSpeciesRabbitLikesSurfing, Making deliveries, Her friendsRelativesHalley's FamilyHalley is one of the members of the Astroblast crew. She is a bunny rabbit who wears a hot pink spacesuit. She admires surfing and gives people rides and makes smoothie deliveries on her surfboard Neutrino. She is voiced byGigi Abraham. Halley is a rabbit who has pink skin, two bunny ears, pink cheeks, a red nose and white eyes with eyelashes. She has a pair of goggles on her head, and she wears a hot pink and yellow spacesuit, pink space boots and a white cotton tail. One of the ears is floppy than the other. Halley has a cheerful and fun-loving personality, she loves playing games with her friends. Also, since she is a rabbit, she is likely to have a very caring personality where she would comfort her friends whenever they are feeling sad. Since all rabbits have that consoling personality trait, along with gentle and friendly traits, Halley makes for a great friend for those times. She is also close friends withComet. Halley has a cheerful and fun-loving personality, she loves playing games with her friends. Since all rabbits have that consoling personality trait, along with gentle and friendly traits, Halley makes for a great friend for those times. She is also close friends withComet.

characters.name: Halley's Family
characters.description: Halley's FamilyBackground informationOnly AppearanceA Star is BornOverviewSpeciesRabbitHalley's Familyare a group of rabbits who only appeared in the episodeA Star is Born. Pictured are Halley’s parents, grandfather, and three cousins.

characters.name: Hunderfrumps
characters.description: HunderfrumpsBackground informationFirst AppearanceSmoothie OperatorLast AppearanceKapowsers!OverviewNameHunderfrumps Hunderfrumps are an alien species with long and tall bodies. They first appeared inSmoothie Operator. Hunderfrumps typically have around 1-3 eyes max. They also have 2 legs and usually 1-3 hairs. InSmoothie Operator, they are shown to dislike Plorpian plum smoothies. inJust Peachyone of them likes the smell of peaches and never eats peaches because she's allergic. Every time she eats one, she breaks out in bright green spots.

characters.name: Jet
characters.description: JetBackground informationFirst AppearanceSpic 'n SpanLast AppearanceKapowsers!OverviewNameJetGenderMaleSpeciesAlligatorJet is one of the members of the Astroblast crew. He is an Alligator who wears orange. Unlike the other members, he does not speak throughout the series for unknown reasons. Jet has bug eyes, three sharp teeth and a green skin. He wore an orange cap and matching spacesuit, and he also has white space boots with red soles and a red rim, and an alligator's tail. Jet's spacesuit has pockets, The neck of his spacesuit and the ends of his sleeves are white. His hands are pointy, like an actual alligator's, and his orange cap has a red rim, with the Frosty Stars logo on it. Jet has a quiet personality, he does not talk at all. Instead, he is silent, and uses gestures so that his friends understand him. He is also close friends withSputnik. Jet can be competitive, as seen inHole in One, where he is very competitive with Sputnik. Jet has a quiet personality, he does not talk at all. Instead, he is silent, and uses gestures so that his friends understand him. He is also close friends withSputnik. Jet can be competitive, as seen inHole in One, where he is very competitive with Sputnik.

characters.name: Laney
characters.description: Laney is an alien customer from Meetu. She is a red alien customer and creature with freckles in the middle of her face above her mouth with only a white rounded buck tooth and between her two rounded circle eyes with two black eyelashes on them in different styles and looks. (Connected and apart and oppositely) She even has dark red hair which is short and flat and frilly and bumpy on top and she also has curly braided pigtails/tails with small green elastic scrunchie bands to them. They match the same color as her hair-bow on the back of her head and green short-sleeved dress with a light green heart on it and a big platter tulle/tutu skirt with 7-8 medium-sized wavy frills around it connected to her T-shirt and have white cuffed trims to her short sleeves and platter tutu to the bottom. She also has rounded hands like all doll or plush doll or any other rounded hand and/or foot character(s) from different TV shows and other content. Also, she has rounded flat circular feet with monster claws to her toes. Her appearance is in "Don't Fear The Surfboard" as she never appeared in any other Astroblast! episodes.

characters.name: Piffins
characters.description: PiffinsPookumsBackground informationFirst AppearanceAre You My Piffin?Last AppearanceKapowsers!(does not speak)OverviewNamePiffinsPiffinsare small, adorable alien species. They are known for their cheerful personality and they are often adopted as pets. One of them, namedPookums, first appeared in the episodeAre You My Piffin?, while they also appear as one of the costumes worn in the episodeA Star is Born.

characters.name: Radar
characters.description: RadarBackground informationFirst AppearanceSpic 'n SpanLast AppearanceKapowsers!OverviewNameRadarGenderMaleSpeciesMonkeyLikesPlaying with his friends, Billy StarriderRadar is one of the members of the Astroblast crew, he is a monkey who wears green, he is voiced byJoe Gaudet. Radar is a monkey, who has brown fur, orange face, red nose and wears a green spacesuit and matching space boots. He also has a monkey's tail. His green spacesuit also has pockets, the ends of his sleeves are white, the collar of his space suit is white, he has white boots with green soles and green laces (?). His spacesuit also has the frosty star's logo on it. Radar is known for his playful, energetic personality, he really likes playing with his friends, but sometimes, he hates losing, Radar also likes playing with his Billy Starrider toy, which sometimes he gets addicted to it, Radar is also known for inventing gadgets for certain situations, and he can be a bit clumsy sometimes. Radar can also be pretty rude and inconsiderate, given the things he says about Gam-Gam inGamGam Knows Best, and how inconsiderate he was inWhat a Mess!andSing Along to the Bouncing Monkey. He is hinted to have never cleaned up after himself inWhat a Mess!, aswell. characters.name: Sal
characters.description: SalBackground informationFirst AppearanceSpic 'n SpanLast AppearanceKapowsers!OverviewNameSalGenderMaleSpeciesOctopusLikesHelping his friends, fixing problems, sharing hisGamGam's advice.RelativesGamGam(grandmother)Sal is a purple, three-eyed Octopus who is one of the members of the Astroblast Crew, he is voiced byJohn Taylor. Sal is purple, has three round, circular eyes, three teeth that stick out of his mouth, a beige brimmed hat with a purple band that has a unique design of green branches and pink sticks and flowers on it. He has three cyan strands of hair on his head. Sal has a mildly pink, wide gradient in the middle of his face, that same pink on the middle (?) part of the tentacles closer to his upper half, a darker purple gradient on his bottom half, the same pink gradient on the ends of his bottom tentacles, and a lighter pink at the inner parts of his tentacles. He has spots all over his body, darker purple spots on his upper half, lighter spots on his lower half and one of his lower tentacles, and the same darker spots on three of his lower tentacles. Sal has a wise personality. He often shares hisGamGam's advice whenever there's trouble going on, and he also repairs broken stuff and manages the space station. He also likes to cheer his friends up when there's a problem. Sal has more maturity than the rest, knowing how to control his emotions, not jumping to conclusions or being unreasonable, and trying to offer reasonable solutions to his friends, although this doesn't work too often, as seen in a few episodes. Sal has his limits, as seen inA Star is Born, where he doesn't seem to tolerate Comet constantly interfering with his friends performances. He doesn't outright snap in this episode, however he does show signs of being very annoyed at Comet's attitude. Sal has a wise personality. He doesn't outright snap in this episode, however he does show signs of being very annoyed at Comet's attitude.

characters.name: Sputnik
characters.description: SputnikBackground informationFirst AppearanceSpic 'n SpanLast AppearanceKapowsers!Voiced byVeronica TaylorOverviewNameSputnikGenderFemaleSpeciesPigLikesQuiet stuff, reading books, doing puzzlesSputnik is a young pig who wears a purple suit. She is head smoothie maker at the Astroblast Space Station's smoothie diner, the Frosty Star. She is voiced byVeronica Taylor. Sputnik has pink skin, a peach nose, ears and hands. She wore a yellow star on her left ear, and a purple suit. Sputnik is known for her quiet personality, she likes reading, puzzles and even doing quiet things, she is also friends with her quiet friendJet. Sputnik is known for her quiet personality, she likes reading, puzzles and even doing quiet things, she is also friends with her quiet friendJet.

characters.name: Staneckians
characters.description: StaneckiansBackground informationFirst AppearanceJust PeachyLast AppearanceKapowsers!OverviewNameStaneckians Staneckians are a giraffe-like alien species. They first appeared inJust Peachy. Staneckians are very similar to giraffes. They have long necks, patches, and antlers. They also have feathery tails and 3 eyes.

characters.name: Zelda and Morg
characters.description: Zelda and MorgBackground informationOnly AppearanceRadar Sleeps OverCreated byDenise BrossmanVoiced byGigi Abraham(Zelda)Vinnie Penna(Morg)OverviewNameZelda and MorgGenderFemale (Zelda), Male (Morg)SpeciesMonkeyRelativesRadar(cousin)Zelda and Morgare Radar's cousins, they only appeared in the episodeRadar Sleeps Over. Vinnie Penna(Morg) In the beginning of the episode, Zelda and Morg's colors of their space outfits were different colors. Zelda's outfit was purple and Morg's was orange. Zelda does not have any eyelashes of any kind on her eyes like other characters that are female anthropomorphic animals and alien customers and workers do. Sometimes, eyelashes are connected or disconnected.

characters.description: ZethroBackground informationOnly AppearanceSurfin' Space SafariOverviewNameZethroGendermaleSpeciesAlienRelativesBhanu(Middle sister)Pip(Younger sister) Pip(Younger sister) Zethro is a lizard-like alien, and he is one ofHalley's surfing friends along withBhanuandPip. He only appeared inSurfin' Space Safari.
